title: The Children’s Rescue Becomes Urgent
description: On pages 11–14, this part follows Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the children’s rescue becomes urgent.
scene: The scene focuses on the children’s rescue becomes urgent, with Punk Hazard Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Seriously, what are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just a little situation with my body...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who in the world are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Scary!! Too strong, and too scary!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why are you even attacking me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is too scary, and too creepy!!

summary: The Children’s Rescue Becomes Urgent. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
